> **Image-access mode: description-only.** This analysis was produced without analyst-verified pixels of [2] referenced image(s). All "observed" claims below are transcriptions of the user's prose, name, voice, or sketch — not pixel-verified. Dimensional confidence is capped per `references/confidence-language.md`. Builder handoffs derived from this analysis are **provisional** by default.

```yaml
intake:
  image_access_mode: description-only
  images_referenced: 2
  images_viewable: 0
  recovery_path: requested-and-declined
  source_qualifiers: [user-prose]
  confidence_ceiling: provisional
  notes: "user opted to proceed without re-attaching"
```

# Example: Treasure-chest reverse-engineer notes (description-only)

This is a fixture — its only job is to demonstrate the required banner + intake block. Real analysis would follow the rest of `observation-template.md`.
